message: Update 1.0.8: Animated heart valve leaflets + Science behind on all sims + plain-English Bio-Synth labels. Close all Nova windows and reopen (or DOWNLOAD UPDATE).
releaseNotes: 1.0.8 — Valve cusps open/shut with heartbeat (freeze on MI). Science behind panels for circulation, force & motion, maths, english. Sinus rhythm = normal heartbeat; telemetry = live readings; alarm = dangerous rhythm warning.
